overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail at night through a rocky, grassy natural environment. The path is illuminated by a flashlight beam, revealing uneven terrain and vegetation. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring realistic textures and lighting dynamics typical of survival or exploration games.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the uneven dirt path, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight while navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain with boulders and sparse grass covering the left side of the trail
narrow winding trail composed of compacted dirt and scattered small stones
tall grass and low shrubs growing along the edge of the rocky hillside
dense grass and undergrowth lining the right side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees visible in the far distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated only by a flashlight beam. A rocky hillside rises immediately to the left while grass and vegetation line both sides of the path. The environment remains consistent throughout, with no other characters or significant events occurring as the viewer progresses through the dark, natural terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded dirt trail that maintains a tense, nocturnal atmosphere. It begins with a narrow flashlight beam cutting through the darkness, revealing the immediate textures of the earthen path. As the camera progresses, the light catches the rugged surface of a rocky hillside rising steeply to the left. The scene then persists through a steady trek, with the beam flickering across the dense grass and wild vegetation lining both sides of the way. The movement finally carries the viewer deeper into the silent, natural terrain, where the oppressive dark remains unbroken by any other light source.
